content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 7, 0), (4, 6, 0), (0, 1, 6), (1, 9, 6), (2, 4, 6), (2, 8, 9), (6, 7, 10), (0, 2, 13), (5, 8, 14), (1, 2, 15), (2, 5, 19), (0, 5, 27), (1, 4, 27), (2, 9, 28), (4, 8, 29)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 27.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (2, 7, 0) has node 2 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (4, 6, 0) has node 4 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 1, 6) has node 0 and time 6. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 9, 6) has node 1 and time 6. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 4, 6) has node 2 and time 6. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 8, 9) has node 2 and time 9. -> Ignore.
* Edge (6, 7, 10) has node 6 and time 10. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 2, 13) has node 0 and time 13. -> Ignore.
* Edge (5, 8, 14) has node 5 and time 14. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 2, 15) has node 1 and time 15. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 5, 19) has node 2 and time 19. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 5, 27) has node 0 and time 27. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (1, 4, 27) has node 1 and time 27. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 9, 28) has node 2 and time 28. -> Ignore.
* Edge (4, 8, 29) has node 4 and time 29. -> Ignore.

The nodes matched are 5 and 8.

Answer: [5, 8]
